home.philosophy:
We create new possibilities
at the intersection of
technology and artistry.
We design experiences
beyond development.

company.heroDesc: HADEUL SOFT is transforming the digital world through innovative technology in AI, content, and software solutions.
company.missionHeading: Creating New Value Through Technology & Creativity
company.missionDesc: HADEUL SOFT goes beyond simple collaboration, continuously sharing new technologies and knowledge for the entire organization to evolve together.
company.vision2030: A Global Leader in AI Agent-Based Services, Ahead of Change
company.coreSubtitle: We deliver optimal solutions built on expertise accumulated across diverse industries.
company.coreClickHint: Click a card to explore the detailed tech stack

ai.title: AI & Deep Tech
ai.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence & Deep Learning
ai.desc: Enterprise-tailored solutions powered by LLM, Computer Vision, and NLP technologies
ai.detail: We design and build customized AI solutions to solve business challenges using cutting-edge technology — from large language models (LLM) and computer vision to natural language processing.

digital.title: Digital Product
digital.subtitle: Web · App · SaaS
digital.desc: Enterprise web apps, mobile apps, and SaaS platform design & development
digital.detail: We design and build enterprise web applications, mobile apps, and SaaS platforms using cutting-edge frontend and backend technologies — from micro frontend architecture to serverless.

iot.title: IoT & Edge
iot.subtitle: Smart Industry
iot.desc: Sensor data collection, real-time monitoring, and smart factory automation
iot.detail: We build smart factory automation by collecting and analyzing sensor data in real-time. Combining Edge AI and Digital Twin technology for next-generation industrial solutions.

defense.title: Defense & Maritime
defense.subtitle: Specialized Defense & Maritime Systems
defense.desc: Defense simulation, maritime control systems, and security solution development
defense.detail: We develop software for specialized fields demanding high reliability and security — defense simulation, maritime control systems, and security solutions compliant with military and maritime standards.

game.title: Interactive Contents
game.subtitle: Interactive Content
game.desc: Mobile/PC cross-platform content development and live service operations
game.detail: We support the entire lifecycle of mobile/PC cross-platform games — from planning through launch to live service operations — delivering high-quality content with diverse game engine expertise.

cloud.title: Cloud & Infra
cloud.subtitle: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.desc: CI/CD pipelines, cloud architecture, and monitoring system setup
cloud.detail: We build DevOps infrastructure that boosts development productivity and service stability — from cloud-native architecture and CI/CD pipelines to monitoring and alerting systems.

company.ctaDesc: We deeply understand your business, gain insight into core challenges, and deliver practical solutions.
company.ctaSubDesc: Don't worry about complex technical challenges. HADEUL SOFT takes full responsibility for your satisfaction.

services.aiSolutionsDesc: We design and build enterprise-tailored solutions using cutting-edge AI — LLM, computer vision, and generative AI.
services.softwareSolutionsDesc: We design and build enterprise-grade web/apps, cloud infrastructure, and data pipelines.
services.ownContentDesc: Crafting immersive gaming experiences — from cross-platform development to live service operations.

portfolio.heroDesc: Explore our featured projects across industries.

careers.heroTitle:
We're Looking for
Partners to Build
the AI Era Together
careers.heroDesc: HADEUL SOFT is looking for passionate talent to join us on a journey to change the world through technology.
careers.waySubtitle: Six principles HADEUL SOFT upholds in the rapidly evolving AI era.

agile.title: Agile Execution
agile.desc: Not bound by fixed procedures, we quickly adapt strategy and technology to the latest AI paradigms.

userCentric.title: User-Centric
userCentric.desc: We constantly ask 'Is this truly valuable to users?' and focus on what matters most.

shareEvolve.title: Share & Evolve
shareEvolve.desc: Beyond collaboration, we continuously share new technology and knowledge, evolving together as an organization.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.desc: Each of us takes ownership of our projects to the end, never compromising on quality.

innovative.title: Innovative Thinking
innovative.desc: We don't fear change — if there's a better way, we boldly adopt it.

trust.title: Trust-based Communication
trust.desc: We share honest opinions in a flat structure and respect each other's expertise.

review.title: Application Review
review.desc: We review your resume and portfolio.

interview.title: Technical Interview
interview.desc: We discuss your skills and experience.

join.title: Final Onboarding
join.desc: After offer negotiation, we start together.

careers.noPositionsDesc: We're always open to applications. Send us your resume and we'll reach out when the right position opens.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does the hiring process take?
faq.a1: We schedule interviews within 1–2 weeks after document review. The entire process takes approximately 2–3 weeks.
faq.q2: How do I check my application status?
faq.a2: We'll notify you via email. Document review results are sent within one week of submission.
faq.q3: Can I apply when there are no open positions?
faq.a3: Yes, we accept rolling applications. Send your resume to hadeulsoft@gmail.com and we'll reach out when a suitable role opens.

careerDetail.notFoundDesc: This posting has been removed or does not exist.
